summary: Composer (SpatialBOQCanvas) 10 UX Enhancements - Frontend Testing Complete. All 10 requested features verified working: 1) Wall Edit & Movement with endpoint handles, 2) Module Magnetic Snap to walls, 3) Corner Snap for walls, 4) Wall Drawing Options Panel (Rectangle/Square/Free), 5) Door & Window Library panels with selectable types, 6) Door/Window Movement along walls, 7) Module Wall Pinning with green indicator, 8) Carcass Finish dropdown field, 9) Full-screen Elevation View modal, 10) Sharp square wall corners (strokeLinecap=square).
passed_tests: Composer page renders at /projects/{project_id}/spatial-boq route
Item #1: Wall tool - click on wall to select, shows blue highlight
Item #1: Wall endpoints - selected wall shows circular handles at start/end for resizing
Item #1: Wall properties panel shows editable Start X/Y and End X/Y coordinates
Item #1: Movement hint appears: 'Drag wall to reposition • Drag endpoints to resize • Delete to remove'
Item #2: Module magnetic snap - placing module near wall auto-snaps and assigns wall_id
Item #3: Corner snap - wall drawing near existing corner snaps to join (CORNER_SNAP_THRESHOLD=150mm)
Item #4: Wall Drawing Options Panel - clicking wall tool shows Draw Mode panel
Item #4: Rectangle Room mode - 'Drag to create 4 walls' option available
Item #4: Square Room mode - 'Create equal-sided room' option available
Item #4: Free Line Draw mode - 'Draw individual walls' option available
Item #5: Door Library Panel - clicking door tool shows Door Types panel
Item #5: Door types available: Single Swing (900×2100mm), Double Swing (1500×2100mm), Sliding Door (1200×2100mm), Pocket Door (900×2100mm), French Door (1800×2100mm)
Item #5: Window Library Panel - clicking window tool shows Window Types panel
Item #5: Window types available: Standard Window (1200×1200mm), Large Window (1800×1500mm), Small Window (600×600mm), Floor to Ceiling (1500×2400mm), Bay Window (2000×1200mm)
Item #5: Door/window with selected type places on nearest wall
Item #6: Door movement - door properties show 'Attached Wall: On wall' (green text)
Item #6: Window movement - window properties show 'Attached Wall: On wall' (green text)
Item #6: Movement hint for door/window: 'Drag to move along wall • Arrow keys to slide • Delete to remove'
Item #7: Module wall pinning - modules auto-bind to nearest wall_id when placed close to wall
Item #7: Pinned modules show green indicator dot at top of module
Item #7: Properties panel shows 'Wall Pin: Pinned to wall' (green text) when module is pinned
Item #7: Elevation view shows modules pinned to selected wall with dimensions and finish
Item #8: Carcass Finish dropdown - new property in module properties panel
Item #8: Carcass Finish options: Laminate, PU White, PU Colored, Melamine, Veneer, Raw/Unfinished
Item #9: Full-screen elevation - View 2D Elevation button opens full-screen modal
Item #9: Elevation modal shows: Wall length, Ceiling (2400mm), Floor (0mm), modules with dimensions and colors
Item #9: Elevation modal has 'Exit Elevation View' button
Item #10: Wall corners are sharp/square not rounded (strokeLinecap='square' verified in SVG)
Movement hints appear for module/door/window/wall when selected
Properties panel shows editable coordinates for walls (Start X/Y, End X/Y)
Live pricing header updates: Modules count, Area (sqft), Est. Cost (₹)
seed_data_creation: Used existing project 'test for yadhu - Interior Project' (proj_8aeea5f1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Composer (SpatialBOQCanvas) 10 UX enhancements fully tested and working. All features verified: 1) Wall edit/movement with endpoint handles, 2) Module magnetic snap, 3) Corner snap, 4) Wall drawing options panel (Rectangle/Square/Free), 5) Door/Window library panels with types, 6) Door/window movement along walls, 7) Module wall pinning with green indicator, 8) Carcass finish dropdown, 9) Full-screen elevation modal, 10) Sharp square wall corners. Test project: proj_8aeea5f1.

item_1_wall_edit_movement.details: Wall selection shows blue highlight, circular endpoint handles at start/end for resizing, properties panel shows editable Start X/Y and End X/Y coordinates, movement hint displayed

item_2_magnetic_snap.details: Modules placed near walls auto-snap to wall position (SNAP_THRESHOLD=100mm), wall_id assigned automatically

item_3_corner_snap.details: Wall drawing near existing corner snaps to join (CORNER_SNAP_THRESHOLD=150mm), findNearestCorner function implemented

item_4_wall_drawing_options.details: Draw Mode panel shows Rectangle Room, Square Room, Free Line Draw options with descriptions

item_5_door_window_library.details: Door Types panel: Single Swing, Double Swing, Sliding, Pocket, French. Window Types panel: Standard, Large, Small, Floor to Ceiling, Bay

item_6_door_window_movement.details: Doors/windows show 'Attached Wall: On wall' status, movement hint for sliding along wall, arrow keys support

item_7_module_wall_pinning.details: Modules show green pin indicator when pinned to wall, properties panel shows 'Wall Pin: Pinned to wall' in green, elevation view shows pinned modules

item_8_carcass_finish.details: Carcass Finish dropdown in properties panel with options: Laminate, PU White, PU Colored, Melamine, Veneer, Raw/Unfinished

item_9_elevation_view.details: Full-screen modal shows 2D Wall Elevation View with wall length, ceiling/floor markers, modules with dimensions and finish labels

item_10_sharp_corners.details: Wall SVG lines use strokeLinecap='square' for sharp corners instead of rounded
